work_experience_normalized.description: Department of Control and Aeroelastic Loads for Wind Turbines. Simulation of onshore and offshore wind turbines aeroelastic loads with Bladed, Flex5 y Hawc2 - Development of tools to postprocess the simulation results with Python and MATLAB - Simulations and documentation for the certification of a damper for offshore wind turbines with DNV - Calculations and documentation for the site-specific certification of a nearshore wind farm with TUV Nord - Analysis of measured vibration data (SCADA) compared against simulations of aeroelastic models - Studies of the impact of new hardware or software on the wind turbine performance - Site-specific wind characterization using WindPro and WASP

Simulations of thermomechanical problems with an internal finite element software for its validation - Mathematical modelling of an ultrasonic flowmeter with MATLAB - Review of component trees of combined cycle power plants from the plants drawings - Support for the development of rules for the inspection for components of combined cycle plants

Calculation of the lifespan of a nuclear reactor nozzle subjected to thermal fatigue stresses - Solution of probabilistic inverse problems by means of Bayesian statistics - Development of a structured meshing algorithm with quad type elements in MATLAB to solve bidimensional finite element problems - Support in the implementation of the meshing algorithm in an internal finite element software
Development of route optimization software for waste collection vehicles
